product_information.description:
A dual-ended eyebrow brush that helps you groom and lift brows into a fluffy, feathered soap brow look.
Dual-ended eyebrow wax applicator and spoolie brush
Tame, lift, and shape brows for a feathered look
Easily pick up and apply eyebrow gels, waxes, and soaps
Ideal for applying with our Brow Lift
Your must-have tool for achieving perfectly on-trend “soap brows.” This unique, dual-ended eyebrow brush features a flat gel applicator to effortlessly pick up and apply eyebrow wax, gel, or soap, plus a spoolie on the other end to tame and shape brows into that beautifully groomed, feathered finish. Pairs perfectly with our Brow Lift eyebrow shaping wax!
How to do Soap Brows:
Step 1: Slightly bend the spoolie of your Brow Lift Applicator, then dip into the Brow Lift gel.
Step 2: Brush the spoolie through your brows directing hairs upwards and outwards for a fluffy, lifted look.
Step 3: Use the spatula end of the Brow Lift Applicator to flatten the brow hair in the same direction for a laminated look that stays put.
Step 4: Fill in sparse areas of your brows with your favorite e.l.f. cosmetics eyebrow makeup coloUr.
